text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Paßions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>fl. 2.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahlii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelle Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>32. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>48. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hauß-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>40. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"Corrected encoding artifacts (MacRoman to UTF-8: '√ü' to 'ß', '√†' to 'à'). parsed.explanation: Corrected encoding artifacts (MacRoman to UTF-8: '√ü' to 'ß', '√†' to 'à'). Escaped ampersands ('&' to '&') to ensure valid XML. Fixed mismatched tag '<PRICE>' to '<PRIZE>' to match the closing tag and other entries. Corrected OCR errors: 'Stahiii' to 'Stahlii' and 'Nouvelie' to 'Nouvelle'.
